title: THUG Invitational/Season 3
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:THUG Invitational: Season 3}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=THUG Invitational: Season 3 |icon= |tickername=THUG Invitational S3 |shortname=THUG Invitational S3 |image=Thug Invitational S3.jpg |type=Online |team_number=20 |series=THUG Invitational |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://villageresports.in/ |organizer2=Thug |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=3,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-27 |edate=2021-10-01 |twitter= |instagram=8bit_thug |web= |discord=Nvs4KXpG |facebook= |loco=streamers/Thugwa |youtube=channel/UCV01cEjT9EGakHXILA_uZOQ |previous=THUG_Invitational{{!}}Season 2 |next=THUG_Invitational/Season_4{{!}}Season 4 }} '''[[Thug]]''' in association with '''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''' present the third season of the BGMI invitational tournament ''Thug Invitational'' called the '''''Thug InvitationaL Season 3''''' with a prize pool of ₹3,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=CrackJacker Gaming |b2=SardarjiYT }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''THUG Invitational:''' 27th September 2021 to 1st October 2021.'' * ''20 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''3 matches to be played each day.'' * ''15 matches to be played over a period of 5 days.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays: 3 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>S ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-16}}||1 |- |{{Placement|17-20}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹3,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $4074 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
